prompt: Hold the deal until PG&E credit is rechecked, ask for collateral, and keep legal and credit on one internal review loop.
summary: Sara Shackleton instructs that the 5/11 Financial Power trade with PG&E (EW9838) be placed on hold pending an immediate credit re-evaluation; requests acceptable collateral from PG&E; directs Credit and Legal to coordinate and issue a single internal approval before any settlement proceeds. The Credit group acknowledges and commits to the recheck and collateral request.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal — Hold Pending Credit/Legal Review
messages.body_text:
Mark,

Per the prior notice that Credit/Legal had restricted Financial Power deals with PG&E Energy Trading - Power L.P. (EW9838), we are placing the 5/11 trade on hold pending an immediate credit re-evaluation. Please instruct the trading desk to suspend settlement and not to confirm any movement until Credit clears the exposure.

Action requested:
- Credit: re-run PG&E credit review and specify required collateral (letter of credit or cash margin) for this trade.
- Legal: coordinate with Credit to review any collateral/documentation so we issue a single internal approval before release.

Confirm receipt and that the trade will be paused.

Sara
messages.rationale: Implements the intervention to hold the deal, request collateral, and keep Credit and Legal on a single coordinated review before any settlement.

messages.subject: RE: PG&E Financial Power Deal — Credit/Legal joint review
messages.body_text:
Sara,

Acknowledged. Credit will re-check PG&E (EW9838) immediately and request acceptable collateral from the counterparty — typically an irrevocable letter of credit or cash margin — before authorizing settlement. We will coordinate directly with Legal so the credit terms and documentation are reviewed together and provide a single recommendation/approval. Expect an update by EOD with the re-evaluation and proposed collateral requirements.

Credit Review Team
messages.rationale: Acknowledges the hold, commits to re-evaluating PG&E credit, requests collateral from the counterparty, and confirms coordination with Legal to produce a single internal approval.

top_subjects: RE: PG&E Financial Power Deal — Credit/Legal joint review
PG&E Financial Power Deal — Hold Pending Credit/Legal Review
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
